title: The Seraphim Turn the Battlefield
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Shaka, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Kid, Unknown person #9 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can someone tell me what these things are?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaka! I've bound Lucci and Kaku with Seastone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: much obliged, Stussy. We're leaving the island, you should come with us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey! You can't keep adding people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, a truly unexpected development happened...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Dr. vegapunk's main 'stella' body has vanished...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Not for me, I wasn't scared!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: There were Marines all over the place!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't mean to leave ya in such a bad spot...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Those marine meanings were the worst!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They said they were here for Whitebeard's treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you play nice, you won't get hurt, okay?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
